# Alex Leung

> Software engineer and writer based in Waterloo, Ontario, Canada. Licensed Professional Engineer (P.Eng.) writing about systems, AI, and learning in public.

## Background

Alex Leung is a software engineer whose background spans embedded systems, distributed systems, and full-stack product engineering. He has worked across home electrification, AR/AI hardware, and consumer product engineering, and writes about systems, AI, and learning in public.

He holds a Master of Science in Electrical and Computer Engineering from Georgia Institute of Technology and a Bachelor of Applied Science in Electrical Engineering from the University of Waterloo.

He is a licensed Professional Engineer (P.Eng.) through Professional Engineers Ontario (PEO).

## Areas of Expertise

- Software Engineering
- AI Systems
- Machine Learning Systems
- Agentic Systems
- Distributed Systems
- Full-Stack Product Engineering
- Systems Design
- Technical Leadership
- Embedded Systems
